fair_claims_settlement_practices.description: Florida unfair claims practices and prohibited conduct.

provisions.title: Unfair Claims Practices
provisions.requirement: Insurers must not engage in unfair claims settlement practices.

no_fault_pip.description: Florida PIP benefits — $10K, 14-day rule, 80% medical, 60% lost wages.

provisions.title: PIP Benefits
provisions.requirement: PIP provides $10,000 in benefits. 14-day rule for treatment; 80% medical, 60% lost wages.

total_loss_regulations.description: Florida total-loss threshold — 80% of ACV or owner-retained.

provisions.title: Total Loss Threshold
provisions.requirement: Vehicle is total loss when repair cost exceeds 80% of ACV or when owner retains salvage.
provisions.formula: Total Loss if: Repair Cost > 80% ACV, or owner-retained

time_limits_and_deadlines.description: Critical time limits for Florida auto claims.

deadlines.action: Civil Remedy Notice (before bad faith suit)

required_disclosures.description: Mandatory disclosures for Florida auto claims.

disclosures.title: Repair Shop Choice
disclosures.requirement: Insurer must disclose claimant's right to choose repair shop.

disclosures.title: Rental Reimbursement
disclosures.requirement: Rental reimbursement terms must be disclosed.

uninsured_underinsured_motorist.description: Florida UM — mandatory; stacking/non-stacking options; rejection waiver.

provisions.title: Mandatory UM
provisions.requirement: UM coverage is mandatory. Stacking and non-stacking options available.

anti_fraud_provisions.description: Florida insurance fraud and SIU requirements.

provisions.title: Insurance Fraud
provisions.requirement: Insurance fraud is a criminal offense under FS §817.234.

provisions.title: SIU Requirements
provisions.requirement: SIU formation and reporting under FS §626.9891.

repair_standards.description: Florida shop choice and aftermarket parts disclosure.

provisions.title: Shop Choice
provisions.requirement: Claimant has right to choose repair shop.

provisions.title: Aftermarket Parts Disclosure
provisions.requirement: Aftermarket parts must be disclosed per FS §501.976.

good_faith_requirements.description: Florida statutory bad faith — Civil Remedy Notice required before suit.

prohibited_practices.title: Bad Faith
prohibited_practices.description: Statutory bad faith under FS §624.155. Civil Remedy Notice must be filed 60 days before suit.

subrogation_rules.description: Florida follows made-whole doctrine. Collateral source rule under FS §768.76.

provisions.title: Made Whole Doctrine
provisions.requirement: Florida follows made-whole doctrine — insurer cannot pursue subrogation until insured is fully compensated.

rental_car_coverage.description: Florida loss-of-use for windshield; rental reimbursement terms.

provisions.title: Windshield Loss of Use
provisions.requirement: FS §627.7263 governs loss-of-use for windshield claims.

comparative_fault.description: Florida modified comparative fault — 51% bar (effective 2023 tort reform).

provisions.title: Modified Comparative Fault
provisions.requirement: Claimant barred from recovery if 51% or more at fault.

statute_of_limitations.description: Florida statute of limitations for auto claims.
